title: Document Azure implementation patterns for later AWS replication
description: Capture the Azure implementation decisions, deployment steps, and operational notes in a reusable format so the AWS team can follow the same approach.
acceptanceCriteria: A written Azure implementation guide exists
The document includes deployment, configuration, validation, and rollback notes
The document clearly marks which steps are reusable for AWS
notes: This task is required by the team operating rules to keep Azure work reproducible for AWS.
The documentation should be updated as the implementation work progresses.
